title: Void Tome
description: An endgame weapon born of Void
body:
![A mod text logotype, Minecraft title-styled text reading "Void Tome"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5Hg51DVf/images/7ee365a752035052a087ccb2dd9e26408a4f08de.png)

📔Base Info

This mod adds an endgame weapon, the **Void Tome** Void Tome is a mid-range weapon, emitting a damaging ray by default. It does not consume ammo nor does it break. However, while you use it **any damage dealt to you will be doubled.**
Obtaining the Void Tome Void Tome is obtained by dropping a regular book into the void in the End after killing the Ender Dragon (the player dropping the book *must* have *"Free the End"* advancement)

🪄Enchantments

Void Tome is heavily modified by its enchantments. Void Tome enchantments are divided to *Form* enchantments and *Meaning* enchantments. *Form* enchantments modify the way you attack with the Void Tome, *Meaning* enchantments add additional effects when the attack hits an enemy. You can have as many Meaning enchantments as you want but only one Form enchantment.
Form enchantments 🌧️**Form of Rain** : you reach out for the endless cold of space, raining cosmic rays around you. Rays are not aimed and each ray deals 100% of player's Void Tome Damage 🗡️**Form of Glass** : you weave a glass blade out of Void Tome, granting it melee capabilities. Thus, it becomes a melee weapon, triggering Meaning enchantments on regular hits and dealing 100% of player's Void Tome Damage per attack (disregarding attack timing) 🔮**Form of Nothing** : a curse. You cast away your humanoid body, becoming a void potential that is propelled forward with insane speed. You deal 50% of player's Void Tome Damage on collision with a mob. However, it barely grants any vertical momentum
Meaning enchantments ✨**Cleansing** : if the attacked mob is affected by a negative effect said effect is cleansed, and the Cleansed effect is applied, lowering mob's max health, armor, attack damage and speed by 20% 🕯️**Darkening** : when the attack hits, you emit waves of darkness that deal *some* damage and knock back mobs nearby 🌑**Devouring** : a curse. all nearby mobs, including you, are being sucked in the attacked mob.
